stimulus: A documentary filmmaker and photographer celebrated by both the journalism community and the gallery ______blank Sundara Patel was invited to curate the retrospective After the Border: South Asian American Storytellers at the South Asian Heritage Museum.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The convention being tested is punctuation between a supplementary phrase and a main clause. The comma correctly marks the boundary between the supplementary phrase (“A documentary...world”), which describes Sundara Patel, and the main clause (“Sundara...Museum”).

Choice A is incorrect because it fails to mark the boundary with appropriate punctuation. Choice B is incorrect because a colon can’t join a supplementary phrase to the following main clause; doing so wrongly suggests the supplementary phrase is being explained or amplified by what follows. Choice C is incorrect because a semicolon can’t join a supplementary phrase to a main clause; semicolons separate two main clauses or items in a complex series.
